name: Raviel, Lord of Phantasms - Shimmering Scraper
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ラビエル－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蹂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>躙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>拳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Raviel, Lord of Phantasms - Heaven-Crushing Fist
desc:
Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 3 monsters. You can only use each of the following effects of "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms - Shimmering Scraper" once per turn.
● (Quick Effect): You can discard this card and target 1 "Raviel, Lord of Phantasms" you control; for the rest of this turn, its ATK becomes double its current ATK, also it can attack all monsters your opponent controls once each.
● If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; add this card to your hand.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Sacred Beasts of Chaos

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
